name: Chicken with Cashews B1
recipeIngredient: 1/2 cup Raw cashews, or up to 1 cup
recipeInstructions:
1. Marinate chicken breasts in salt, pepper, cornstarch, sherry, and egg for 30 minutes.
2. Heat a wok until hot and dry.
3. Add oil and swirl to coat the pan.
4. When the oil is just beginning to smoke, add the marinated chicken pieces, green pepper, and water chestnuts.
5. Stir-fry for 1-2 minutes until the chicken is cooked through.
6. Drain the excess oil through a colander or sieve, reserving about 2-3 tablespoons of oil in the pan.
7. Return the reserved oil to the wok.
8. Add Imperial sauce and hoisin sauce to the pan.
9. Cook for 1-2 minutes until the sauces are slightly thickened.
10. Add the raw cashews (up to 1 cup) and stir-fry everything together until well coated with the sauce.
11. Serve hot.
